gemma3_4b.notes: Gated on HF; config from unsloth mirror. GQA 2:1, head_dim=256 (unusual), 34 layers, sliding window 1024 local + global pattern.

gemma3_12b.notes: Gated on HF; config from unsloth mirror. GQA 2:1, head_dim=256, 48 layers.

gemma3n_e4b.notes: Gated on HF; config from web search. MatFormer elastic model, GQA 4:1, 35 layers. Interesting: same head_dim=256 as Gemma 3 but only 2 KV heads (aggressive GQA).

deepseek_r1_7b.notes: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B. Qwen2 architecture distilled from R1. GQA 7:1, 28 layers.

phi4_14b.notes: Microsoft Phi-4. GQA 4:1, 40 layers. Shorter max context (16K).

qwen3_8b.notes: Qwen3-8B. GQA 4:1, 36 layers. Same GQA ratio as Llama 3.1 8B.

mistral_small_24b.notes: Mistral-Small-3.1-24B. GQA 4:1, 40 layers. Same head config as Mistral 7B but deeper.
